Outcome.WorseText: Below the defined standard outcome; the situation tends toward drawbacks.
Outcome.BelowStandardText: Slightly below the defined standard outcome; a cost or hook is likely.
Outcome.StandardText: Matches the previously defined standard outcome of the scene.
Outcome.AboveStandardText: Above the defined standard outcome; a clear advantage is plausible.
Outcome.BetterText: Clearly above the standard outcome; strong positive impact within scene framing.

Help.EPSpentRecalc: Recalculates XP spent from attributes, skills (including overcap), and maneuver costs; lead attributes are derived and free.
Help.FocusAttributes: Pick up to two lead attributes. Selecting a third one resets that change.
Help.FacetDelta: The concrete attribute value within the lead attribute. Each step changes the value directly.
Help.TempTab: Temporary tab for fields moved out during iteration.

Notification.FocusMaxTwo: A maximum of two lead attributes is allowed.

Attr.KoerperHelp: Lead Attribute Body – Physique, endurance, movement, close-range assertion
Attr.GeistHelp: Lead Attribute Mind – Analysis, knowledge, tech, planning, controlled processing
Attr.PraesenzHelp: Lead Attribute Presence – Impact, expression, influence, social and metaphysical assertion

Facet.StaerkeHelp: Attribute Strength – raw force, prying, carrying, impact
Facet.GrobmotorikHelp: Attribute Gross Motor – large movement coordination, sprint, jump, melee flow
Facet.FeinmotorikHelp: Attribute Fine Motor – precision, finger work, steady hand, delicate tool use
Facet.KonstitutionHelp: Attribute Constitution – resilience, fatigue resistance, pain and toxin tolerance
Facet.AnalyseHelp: Attribute Analysis – pattern recognition, logic, tactical assessment, inference
Facet.WillenskraftHelp: Attribute Willpower – mental steadfastness, self-control, stress resistance, inner counter-pressure
Facet.AufmerksamkeitHelp: Attribute Attention – perception, sustaining focus, stimulus filtering, situational reading
Facet.IntuitionHelp: Attribute Intuition – quick judgements, gut decisions, situational feel, sensory integration
Facet.AusdruckHelp: Attribute Expression – projecting intent and effect outward, clear communication, presence
Facet.EmpathieHelp: Attribute Empathy – reading moods and motives, social fine-tuning, resonant understanding
Facet.DominanzHelp: Attribute Dominance – projecting power, setting limits, asserting own will against resistance
Facet.ResonanzHelp: Attribute Resonance – aura, metaphysical radiance, contact with spirits and supernatural fields
